top3.sql:
WITH RECURSIVE expanded_packaging AS (
    -- Base case: start with all leaf-level items (items that are not parents in packaging_relations)
    SELECT pr.contains_id AS root_id, pr.contains_id AS leaf_id, pr.qty AS total_qty
    FROM packaging_relations pr
    WHERE pr.contains_id NOT IN (SELECT packaging_id FROM packaging_relations)
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Recursive case: expand upwards by joining with packaging_relations
    SELECT ep.root_id, pr.contains_id AS leaf_id, ep.total_qty * ...

WITH RECURSIVE expanded_packaging AS (
  SELECT packaging_id, contains_id, qty, qty AS total_qty
  FROM packaging_relations
  WHERE contains_id NOT IN (SELECT packaging_id FROM packaging_relations)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT ep.packaging_id, pr.contains_id, ep.qty * pr.qty, ep.total_qty * pr.qty
  FROM expanded_packaging ep
  JOIN packaging_relations pr ON ep.contains_id = pr.packaging_id
)
SELECT AVG(total_qty) AS average_total_quantity
FROM expanded_packaging;

WITH RECURSIVE leaf_expansion AS (
    -- Start from leaf items (those not acting as packaging_id)
    SELECT pr.contains_id AS base_item, pr.contains_id AS current_item, pr.qty AS cumulative_qty
    FROM packaging_relations pr
    WHERE pr.contains_id NOT IN (SELECT packaging_id FROM packaging_relations)
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Move upward through packaging hierarchy
    SELECT le.base_item, pr.packaging_id AS current_item, le.cumulative_qty * pr.qty AS cumulative_qty

WITH RECURSIVE leaf_expansion AS (
    -- Start with direct children of each packaging (non-leaf items)
    SELECT pr.packaging_id AS root_id, pr.contains_id AS current_id, pr.qty AS cumulative_qty
    FROM packaging_relations pr
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Recursively expand: if current_id is itself a packaging, multiply quantities
    SELECT le.root_id, pr.contains_id AS current_id, le.cumulative_qty * pr.qty AS cumulative_qty
    FROM leaf_expansion le
    JOIN packaging_relations pr ON le...

WITH RECURSIVE expanded_packaging AS (
  SELECT packaging_id, contains_id, qty, qty AS total_qty
  FROM packaging_relations
  WHERE contains_id NOT IN (SELECT packaging_id FROM packaging_relations)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT ep.packaging_id, pr.contains_id, ep.qty * pr.qty, ep.total_qty * pr.qty
  FROM expanded_packaging ep
  JOIN packaging_relations pr ON ep.contains_id = pr.packaging_id
)
SELECT AVG(total_qty) AS average_total_quantity
FROM expanded_packaging;
